name: Clicker
description: Click as fast as you can in 10 seconds!

name: Rock Paper Scissors
description: Play rock paper scissors against the computer.

name: Echoes of the Forgotten
description: An epic adventure awaits...

name: Funny Shooter 2
description: A 3D shooter — blast waves of red guys in a blocky world!
Slide tiles and merge numbers to reach 2048!

name: Tetris
description: Classic falling blocks puzzle — clear lines and score big!

name: Flappy Bird
description: Flap through pipes — how far can you go?

name: Snake
description: Eat food, grow longer, don't hit the walls!

name: Minesweeper
description: Reveal tiles and avoid the mines — a classic logic puzzle.

name: Tic Tac Toe
description: Beat the AI in this classic X's and O's strategy game.

name: Breakout
description: Smash bricks with a bouncing ball — an arcade classic!

name: Pong
description: The OG arcade game — paddle, ball, and pure reflexes.

name: Memory Match
description: Flip cards and find matching pairs.

name: Connect Four
description: Drop discs and get four in a row before the AI!

name: Hangman
description: Guess the word letter by letter before time runs out!

name: Wordle
description: Guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries — color clues guide you.

name: Sudoku
description: Fill the 9x9 grid with numbers — a brain-bending logic puzzle.

name: Space Invaders
description: Defend Earth from waves of alien invaders!

name: Whack-a-Mole
description: Click the moles before they hide — test your reflexes!

name: Simon Says
description: Repeat the sequence — how long can you remember?

name: Reaction Time
description: How fast are your reflexes? Test your reaction speed!

name: Typing Speed
description: Type as fast as you can — measure your WPM and accuracy.

name: Color Match
description: Does the color match the word? A Stroop effect challenge!

name: Solitaire
description: Classic Klondike solitaire — stack cards into foundations.

name: Chess
description: The game of kings — full chess with legal move validation.

name: Checkers
description: Classic draughts — jump your opponent's pieces to win.

name: Bubble Shooter
description: Aim and shoot — match 3 bubbles to pop them!

name: Platformer
description: Jump across platforms, collect coins, avoid enemies!

name: Endless Runner
description: Run forever, jump over obstacles — how far can you get?
